title: itzankitOptimized
description:
A lightweight modpack that boosts FPS and smooths performance while keeping the vanilla feel of Minecraft.

Optimized for smooth gameplay — get higher FPS, faster loading, and stutter-free Minecraft.
body:
Tired of lag and stutter ruining your Minecraft experience? This modpack is designed to give you smooth FPS without losing the vanilla feel of the game.

It includes a carefully chosen set of optimization and performance mods that improve rendering, reduce input delays, and smooth out chunk loading — so you can enjoy Minecraft the way it was meant to be played.

✔️ Boosted FPS on both low-end and high-end PCs
✔️ Faster world loading & chunk rendering
✔️ No unnecessary content — stays close to vanilla
✔️ Compatible with most Fabric/Forge mods

Whether you’re exploring, building, or PvPing, this pack makes Minecraft buttery smooth and more enjoyable.
